description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). Provision a high-security access zone by creating a new zone named 'R&D Lab' with the authentication mode set to 'Card and PIN'. Create an access rule named 'Lab Access' that links the 'Employees' user group, the 'R&D Lab' zone, and the 'Office Hours' time profile. Ensure all configurations are saved.
